nasb.text: But he said, “You are lazy, very lazy; therefore you say, ‘Let us go and sacrifice to the Lord.’

esv.text: But he said, “You are idle, you are idle; that is why you say, ‘Let us go and sacrifice to the Lord.’

cnv.text: 法老說：“你們確實是懶惰的，所以你們才說：‘讓我們去獻祭給耶和華。’

ccb.text: 法老说：“你们是懒惰的人，懒惰的人！所以才嚷着要去给耶和华献祭。
